videoSnippet.title: Still Theory! || Vincent Keymer vs David Antón || Prague Chess Festival 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/
https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments

Keymer, Vincent (2776) - Anton Guijarro, David (2666)
Prague International Chess Festival 2026 (Chess.com) [07] 2026.03.04
C65 Ruy Lopez, Berlin defence

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bb5 Nf6 4.d3 Bc5 5.Bxc6 dxc6 6.O-O Bg4 7.h3 Bh5 8.g4 Nxg4 9.hxg4 Bxg4 10.Be3 Be7 11.Kg2 f5 12.Qe1 Bxf3+ 13.Kxf3 f4 14.Bd2 Qd6 15.Bc3 g5 16.Ke2 g4 17.f3 h5 18.Nd2 Qe6 19.Nc4 Bf6 20.Rh1 Kf7 21.Qf2 b6 22.a4 Rag8 23.Rag1 g3 24.Qg2 Qe7 25.Kf1 h4 26.Qh3 Rg5 27.Rg2 a6 28.Re2 b5 29.Na5 c5 30.Kg2 Qd6 31.Ra1 Be7 32.Nb3 Qc6 33.Rd1 Qd6 34.Ree1 Qc6 35.Re2 Qd6 36.Nd2 c4 37.d4 exd4 38.e5 Qe6 39.Bxd4 Rd8 40.Ne4 Qxh3+ 41.Kxh3 Rg6 42.Red2 Ke6 43.Bc3 Rxd2 44.Rxd2 b4 45.Bd4 a5 46.c3 Rg8 47.Re2 Rb8 48.Ba7 Rb7 49.Bc5 bxc3 50.bxc3 Bd8 51.Kg4 c6 52.Rd2 Rg7+ 53.Kxf4 Bc7 54.Bd4 h3 55.Nxg3 c5 56.Rh2 cxd4 57.cxd4 c3 58.Rxh3 c2 59.Rh1 Bd8 60.Nf5 Rg2 61.d5+ Kf7 62.e6+ Kf6 63.Ke4 Bb6 64.e7 Bc5 65.d6 Bxd6 66.e8=N+ Ke6 67.Nexd6 Rd2 68.Rc1

0:01 Hello Everyone!
00:30 Game Starts!
04:00 Completely New Game!
16:30 It was in this position
17:05 Standings After Round 7
19:00 Legends of the Channel!
